description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yq, sets APT_CACHE_DIR to the current directory's apt-cache and creates it, initializes QT_PACKAGES, conditionally appends Qt 5.9 modules when the job name contains "5.9", and installs the accumulated QT_PACKAGES together with xvfb, lcov, gcovr, libglu1-mesa-dev and libxrender1 using the apt cache directory. Define a cache keyed "apt-cache" that stores the apt-cache/ path and two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build_5.12 job using the image mardy/qt:xenial-qt512 that runs "mkdir build", "cd build", "qmake CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage .." and "make -j 4", then archives the build/ directory as an artifact; also add a build_5.9 job using the image ubuntu:bionic that runs "export QT_SELECT=qt5", "mkdir build", "cd build", "qmake CONFIG+=debug CONFIG+=coverage .." and "make -j 4", and archives its build/ directory. In the test stage add a test_5.12 job using mardy/qt:xenial-qt512, dependent on build_5.12, that runs "find build | xargs touch", "export TMPDIR=$(pwd)/tmpdir", "mkdir $TMPDIR", "cd build", "make install" and "make coverage-html", always publishing build/coverage-html/ and the tmpdir as artifacts; also add a test_5.9 job using ubuntu:bionic, dependent on build_5.9, that runs the same initial commands and then "make install" followed by "make check", always publishing the tmpdir as an artifact.
